steps.title: Identify the linear scale factor
steps.content: The edge length of cube Y is $\frac{3}{86}$ times the edge length of cube X, so the linear scale factor is $k = \frac{3}{86}$.

steps.title: Apply surface area scaling
steps.content:
For similar solids, surface area scales by $k^2$. Therefore:
$$n = \left(\frac{3}{86}\right)^2 = \frac{9}{7396}$$
This matches choice A — A is correct.
